final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: board orb clear VFX sheet for Orbwalker
Primary request: create a production candidate sprite sheet for match-3 orb clear, cascade, and combo feedback.
Subject: twelve small VFX sprites in a 4x3 sheet: fire burst, ice shards, earth leaves and rocks, heart heal sparkle, armor shield flash, gold coin sparkle, generic orb pop, combo ring, cascade streak, small impact star, dust puff, magic trail.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game VFX sprites, crisp mobile readability.
Composition/framing: 4x3 sprite sheet, each effect centered with padding.
Lighting/mood: energetic but board-readable.
Color palette: elemental colors plus gold and white highlights.
Constraints: PNG with REAL transparent alpha background. Background must be fully transparent in the file itself, not simulated. No checkerboard, no white/gray/black backdrop, no fake transparency preview grid, no rectangular matte, no frame, no panel, no labels, no text, no logo, no watermark, no gore, no casino imagery.
generation_mode: built-in imagegen chroma-key fallback plus deterministic adaptive extraction
